items.name: codebase-indexing
items.description: Index an unfamiliar codebase for efficient navigation

items.name: reverse-engineering
items.description: Reverse-engineer existing codebases into documentation and specs

items.name: test-gen
items.description: Generate comprehensive test suites from existing code

items.name: refactor
items.description: Safe refactoring with test coverage and incremental changes

items.name: extract-docs
items.description: Extract documentation from code into structured markdown

items.name: building-app-mockups
items.description: Build interactive mockups and prototypes

items.name: identify-unknown-libs
items.description: Detect and document unknown libraries in the codebase

items.name: ui-dummy-data
items.description: Build UI pages with typed dummy data first, wire real data later — framework-agnostic

items.name: analyze
items.description: Deep analysis of codebase architecture and dependencies

items.name: sensei-mcp
items.description: Graph-powered code intelligence — search symbols, trace calls, query architecture

items.name: playwright-mcp
items.description: Browser automation — navigate, click, screenshot, evaluate JS

items.name: firebase-mcp
items.description: Firebase project management — apps, rules, environment config

items.name: idea
items.description: Explore a concept — ask clarifying questions, document the problem space. No code.

items.name: analyze
items.description: Assess feasibility against existing code — produce options with tradeoffs. No code.

items.name: blueprint
items.description: Design the architecture — components, interfaces, data flow. No code.

items.name: experiment
items.description: Try an approach — build a minimal prototype, document findings. Code is discardable.

items.name: plan
items.description: Decompose a blueprint into features with acceptance criteria. Creates GitHub issues.

items.name: build
items.description: Implement a feature — locate code, decompose into testable functions, TDD, review

items.name: validate
items.description: Verify implementation — tests pass, acceptance criteria met, no doc drift

items.name: brainstorm
items.description: Open creative conversation — explore ideas, routes content to the right folder by depth

items.name: review
items.description: Quality check — pattern conformance, duplicates, test coverage, doc drift

items.name: persona
items.description: List, add, or switch project personas — role-play users to validate design decisions

items.name: rules
items.description: View, create, or add project rules — enforceable patterns, quality, and process constraints

items.name: patterns
items.description: Show detected patterns, project conventions, and match patterns for a task

items.name: pattern-extract
items.description: Extract a reusable pattern from existing code and write it to PATTERNS.md

items.name: pattern-use
items.description: Look up a pattern by name and apply it to the current task

items.name: refocus
items.description: Re-anchor on current task after drift or compaction — reload state, plan, rules

items.name: status
items.description: Show current workflow state — phase, task, issue, rules, patterns, docs, tools

items.name: product
items.description: Reverse-engineer the full product — generates openspec/product/ docs

items.name: feature
items.description: Plan and implement a new feature end-to-end

items.name: audit
items.description: Audit codebase for quality, security, and best practices

items.name: backlog
items.description: Manage project backlog items

items.name: get-api-docs
items.description: Fetch documentation for a third-party library, SDK, or API before writing code that uses it

items.name: commit
items.description: Create structured git commits with conventional format

items.name: checkpoint
items.description: Record session checkpoint with progress summary

items.name: session
items.description: Manage coding sessions — start, stop, status

items.name: mockup
items.description: Generate interactive UI mockups

items.name: enable
items.description: Enable an opt-in skill for this project

items.name: disable
items.description: Disable an opt-in skill for this project

items.name: help
items.description: Show all available sensei commands and skills

items.name: analyst
items.description: Autonomous problem analysis — requirements, constraints, scope definition

items.name: developer
items.description: Verify implementation approach — file placement, patterns, test plan

items.name: acceptance-tester
items.description: Acceptance testing — verify from user perspective, check criteria, regressions

items.name: ux-designer
items.description: Review interfaces for usability, accessibility, and consistency

items.name: security-reviewer
items.description: Audit for OWASP, auth, data exposure, injection vectors

items.name: performance-engineer
items.description: Analyze complexity, memory, network costs, scalability

items.name: devops-sre
items.description: Check deployability, monitoring, rollback, failure modes

items.name: persona-reviewer
items.description: Review work from any persona perspective — loads personas dynamically

items.name: session-start
items.description: Inject mindsets, rules, personas, and project context on session startup

items.name: pre-tool
items.description: Capture tool inputs before execution for analytics

items.name: post-tool
items.description: Record tool outputs and exit codes after execution
